name: boundless furry rpg edit to support human personas
description:
yoo I updated

  • added 2 short intros

This is the first bot I’ve ever made publicly available. Please don’t bash on me, I think I’d rather not get publically boiled. The image is the first result of “earth” on goggle for credits.

In my very most opinionist opinion, the other bot made by @Mundungus was GOOFY, IT MADE ME SAD AND EMO BECAUSE I COULDN’T USE MY ROBLOX OC!! So I made an edit so that you can become human.

Oh yeah, also, I didn’t think it would be necessary to add the filter. I don’t think someone’s gonna click on this bot and immediately start edging to scout x spy tf2 pro shipping and old men butter fingering trick or treators.
